📋 Get our FREE 14-day playbook for finding high-impact AI opportunities in any business: [https://bit.ly/14-day-playbook-](https://www.youtube.com/redirect?event=video_description&redir_token=QUFFLUhqbVBIX2k4cVRHY2t0dnU5UFdfeEMxTEJuYVR0QXxBQ3Jtc0tsUDJOcVJUeFpHRWhmcFZ1VkNYYkVWTGctZS14NmFoc0N0bzh0VC1NTUMyYWMxUHJndnJvRy1qMWcwWG0zQkoyWmpSeTl3NnFjZFllVkxWOE1ta3doM1RKdGJ6R3ZwbWd5WnU4aUJLMFRsN01ObjVmcw&q=https%3A%2F%2Fbit.ly%2F14-day-playbook-)

Starting an AI business in 2026 has never been easier — even if you have no coding, startup, or technical background. In this video, I break down what the real-world data from my AI agency -Morningside AI, my free community (270k+ members) and my AAA Accelerator to reveal what’s actually working right now when it comes to making money with AI, including the two proven AI business models that are producing the most client wins, the top-selling AI offers businesses are paying $10K–$50K for, how beginners are landing their first clients quickly, and why AI consulting, AI audits, and no-code AI implementation are emerging as the biggest AI business opportunities in 2026. Whether you want to become an AI consultant or learn no-code AI automation as an AI builder, this full guide gives you a clear roadmap with data-backed insights, and step-by-step actions to start or scale your AI business in 2026.

⏱️ Timestamps:
00:00 — Why 2026 is the best time to start an AI business
01:52 — The AI services model explained (and why it works)
04:11 — The TWO proven paths in AI
05:42 — Market growth, deal sizes, and revenue trends
08:40 — The rise of AI audits
10:45 — How fast beginners are landing clients
11:49 — Myth-busting: “too late,” “too hard,” “need to code”
14:20 — Path 1: The Consultant
15:58 — Path 2: The Builder
19:14 — Roadmap to 10k per month

[Read more](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=GTWWNZyIsSc)

metadata.og:description:
I’m an AI entrepreneur from New Zealand. In 2023 I created the 'AI Automation Agency' or 'AAA' model based on my learnings at my own agency Morningside AI.

On this channel I share my learnings from running my own AI Automation Agency, AI SaaS and from helping my community of over 290,000 AI Automation Agency owners to start and scale their own AI business.

My mission is to inspire others to take advantage of the incredible AI opportunity by documenting my journey as an AI entrepreneur.

![Thumbnail (1920x1080)](https://i.ytimg.com/vi_webp/8JLyq_-3n58/maxresdefault.webp)
# [3 years into the AI Agency model. Where it’s all going…](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8JLyq_-3n58)

**Visibility**: Public
**Uploaded by**: [Liam Ottley](http://www.youtube.com/@LiamOttley)
**Uploaded at**: 2026-02-17T19:13:04-08:00
**Published at**: 2026-02-17T19:13:04-08:00
**Length**: 19:01
**Views**: 15541
**Likes**: 511
**Category**: Education

## Description

```
📚 “Seek Signal” in the #1 community for AI entrepreneurs: https://bit.ly/4kG2scV
📈 Become a Wildly Profitable AI Entrepreneur: https://bit.ly/4kPFgJu
🤝 Ready to transform your business with AI? Let's talk: https://bit.ly/4aLv1RU
📋 Get our FREE 14-day playbook for finding high-impact AI opportunities in any business: https://bit.ly/14-day-playbook-

The AI automation agency model has changed more in the past year than in the first two combined. What started as selling simple AI automations has evolved into something much bigger — full technology partnerships where agencies are building custom software, internal tools, and dashboards at a fraction of what it used to cost. With AI engineering pipelines that ship features overnight and MVPs landing in days instead of months, the cost of software has collapsed and opened up budgets that didn't exist 12 months ago. After three years of building Morningside AI and mentoring thousands of agency owners, two proven paths have emerged — Builder and Consultant — and the people winning in 2026 are the ones who picked the path that matches their strengths and committed. This is the most honest breakdown of where the AAA model is headed, what's actually working now, and how to position yourself for the next 5–10 years whether you're just starting your first AI business or scaling an existing agency.

⏱️ Timestamps:
00:00 What We're Covering (3 years into AAA)
04:15 The AI engineering pipeline that ships itself ($5/issues, days-to-MVP)
06:07 From AI automations to full-stack tech partner (bigger scope, bigger budgets)
08:49 Seek signal, not noise: the rooms that accelerate your agency
11:43 The proven paths: Builder vs Consultant (or combine them)
16:20 Tough love + your next 12 months and action plan
```

## Endscreen
    
- [How to Start an AI Business in 2026 | STEP BY STEP](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=GTWWNZyIsSc)

# [Building AI Automations Just Changed Forever](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=l0loW5WtUFU)

**Visibility**: Public
**Uploaded by**: [Liam Ottley](http://www.youtube.com/@LiamOttley)
**Uploaded at**: 2025-10-09T03:11:36-07:00
**Published at**: 2025-10-09T03:11:36-07:00
**Length**: 32:01
**Views**: 37650
**Likes**: 1230
**Category**: Education

## Description

```
📚 Join the #1 community for AI entrepreneurs and connect with 200,000+ members: https://bit.ly/42vM9Yo
📈 We help entrepreneurs, industry experts & developers build and scale their AI Agency: https://bit.ly/3IQYDDq
🤝 Ready to transform your business with AI? Let's talk: https://bit.ly/4mUFq1m
🎙️ Have a story worth telling? Be a guest on my podcast: https://bit.ly/yt-podcast-application

🚀 Apply to Join My Team at Morningside AI: https://bit.ly/work-w-morningside
🚀 Apply to Join My Team at AAA Accelerator: https://bit.ly/work-w-accelerator

My Vlog/BTS Channel: https://bit.ly/LiamOttleyVlogs

Connect with Mark:
https://www.youtube.com/@Mark_Kashef
https://www.linkedin.com/in/mkashef/

Grab Mark's Breakdown:
https://link.excalidraw.com/l/6djVV8pnCbO/8v2vqxQXqxK

We’re entering a new era where you don’t have to build automations — you can describe them.
In this episode, I sit down with Mark Kashef, the creator behind some of the biggest AI automation breakthroughs on YouTube, to unpack the rise of text-to-workflow technology — from n8n’s latest update to the broader Vibe Automation movement that’s redefining how agencies and creators build.
And now, with OpenAI’s new AgentKit and Agent Builder revealed at Dev Day, that future just accelerated. For the first time, we’re seeing automation platforms and foundation models converge — where tools like GPT can directly instantiate workflows, call APIs, and orchestrate agents the same way n8n does visually. The lines between automation builder, coder, and operator are officially blurring.

⏱️ Timestamps:
00:00 - What We're Covering
00:37 - The Rise of Vibe Automation
08:30 - Live Demo: Building Workflows From Prompts
13:00 - What This Means for Agencies & Beginners
20:00 - The Future of the Vibe Ecosystem
```

3

### The System

You're not just learning AI. You're building a business that delivers AI transformation — powered by AI itself.

## Your AI-Powered Business

## Everything You Need is Inside the Accelerator

A complete operating system for your AI business. Unlimited coaching, a proven curriculum, accountability tracking, and a community of AI founders, all designed to get you to revenue fast.

![](https://www.aaaaccelerator.com/images/icons/classroom.png)

### Classroom

10 structured courses covering the full AI agency journey — from your first automation to advanced voice AI systems.

- ›AI agents & workflow automation (n8n, Retell, Lovable, Claude Code)
- ›Sales psychology & closing frameworks
- ›Cold email, LinkedIn & YouTube acquisition systems
- ›Business operations & client delivery

![](https://www.aaaaccelerator.com/images/icons/coaching.png)

### Unlimited 1-1 Coaching

Book as many calls as you need with specialist coaches across every discipline.

- ›Weekly group sessions with Liam
- ›Development, sales & outreach specialists
- ›Personal branding & business strategy
- ›Dedicated success manager for accountability

![](https://www.aaaaccelerator.com/images/icons/community.png)

### Community

A private network of 3,800+ AI entrepreneurs building, sharing wins, and solving problems together.

- ›Real-time help across development & sales
- ›Shared resources, templates & tools
- ›Weekly workshops & live events
- ›Hiring, partnerships & project referrals

### Unlimited Personalized Support

#### Weekly Coaching Sessions with Liam Ottley

Ask questions directly to Liam on your AI business with **weekly coaching calls.**

![Liam Ottley](https://www.aaaaccelerator.com/images/liam/portrait.jpg)

#### 1-1 Development Coaching

Book unlimited 1-on-1 calls with our expert developers for personalized guidance. Get instant solutions for any challenge — from **technical roadblocks to hands-on tool tutorials.**

#### 1-1 Sales Coaching

Book unlimited 1-on-1 calls with our sales coaches, veteran sales strategists with extensive closing experience. You'll be provided with proven and personalized frameworks for **structuring your sales process to close deals with conviction.**

#### 1-1 Personal Branding Coaching

Book unlimited 1-on-1 calls with our personal branding coaches — your dedicated personal brand strategists. Master proven frameworks for **building authority and becoming the go-to expert in your market.**

#### 1-1 Outreach Coaching

Book unlimited 1-on-1 calls with our outreach coach. You'll have access to their proven systems on building **high-converting outreach campaigns that consistently deliver quality leads.**

#### 1-1 Success Manager

You'll be assigned a dedicated Success Manager who provides **1-on-1 guidance and accountability to achieve key milestones.**

#### 1-1 Business Expert Coaching

Book unlimited 1-on-1 calls with our business expert coaches. Experts on **presenting your services as premium packages to convert high-value clients.**

## Your Coaching Team

Learn from practitioners who've built what you're building.

Book unlimited 1-on-1 calls with every coach.

## Stop Guessing. Start Building.

Thousands of businesses need AI automation, but trying to figure it out alone means wasted months, costly mistakes, and zero revenue.

### Going It Alone

### With the AAA Accelerator

Watching free YouTube tutorials with no structure

Following a proven, step-by-step system built by an 8-figure founder

Guessing which AI tools to learn

Building with the exact tech stack that paying clients need

No idea how to find or close clients

Proven sales frameworks and unlimited 1-on-1 sales coaching

Struggling alone with no feedback

Weekly coaching with Liam + a community of 3,800+ peers

Months of trial and error with no revenue

Students closing their first clients within weeks

Imposter syndrome and second-guessing

Confidence backed by real skills, real results, and real support

## Is the AAA Accelerator Right for You?

### This is NOT for you if...

- ✗You're looking for a get-rich-quick scheme with zero effort
- ✗You're not willing to invest time into learning and building
- ✗You want someone to do everything for you
- ✗You're not coachable or open to feedback
- ✗You're just curious about AI but not ready to take action

### This is for you if...

- ✓You want to build a real AI automation agency — not just watch tutorials
- ✓You're willing to put in the work and follow a proven system
- ✓You want direct access to coaches and a founder who's done it at scale
- ✓You're looking to generate $10K–$50K+/month with AI services
- ✓You value mentorship, accountability, and community

3,800+

## Frequently Asked Questions

What exactly is the AAA Accelerator?+

The AAA Accelerator is a comprehensive program that gives you everything you need to build a profitable AI automation agency — a structured classroom curriculum, unlimited 1-on-1 coaching across development, sales, outreach, personal branding, and business strategy, plus a community of 3,800+ fellow AI entrepreneurs.

Do I need technical experience to join?+

No. Our curriculum starts from the foundations, and you get unlimited 1-on-1 development coaching to help you through every technical challenge. Many of our most successful students started with zero coding experience.

How much time do I need to commit?+

Most successful students commit 10-20 hours per week. The program is self-paced with on-demand coaching, so you can fit it around a full-time job if needed. Your dedicated Success Manager will help you create a realistic timeline.

How is this different from free YouTube content?+

YouTube gives you fragments. The Accelerator gives you the complete system — structured curriculum, personalized coaching, proven sales frameworks, outreach templates, and a direct line to people who've already built what you're trying to build. Plus accountability to make sure you actually execute.

What kind of results can I expect?+

Results depend on your effort and execution. Our students have built agencies generating anywhere from their first few thousand dollars to $30K+/month. The Accelerator provides the system, coaching, and support — you provide the work.

What does the coaching actually look like?+

You get unlimited 1-on-1 calls with our full coaching team — development coaches, sales coaches, outreach specialists, personal branding experts, business strategists, and a dedicated Success Manager. Plus weekly group coaching calls directly with Liam.

What happens on the strategy call?+

The strategy call is a free, no-pressure conversation where we learn about your goals, assess if the Accelerator is the right fit for you, and map out what your first 90 days would look like. If it's not a fit, we'll tell you honestly.

Is there a community or am I on my own?+

You're joining a community of 3,800+ AI entrepreneurs worldwide. This is one of the most active and supportive communities in the AI space — members share wins, help each other with challenges, and collaborate on projects daily.

## Ready to Build Your AI Agency?

Take the first step toward building your AI agency.

**Visibility**: Public

## Description

```
📚 Join the #1 community for AI entrepreneurs and connect with 260,000+ members: https://bit.ly/3Xe7IcM
📈 We help entrepreneurs, industry experts & developers build and scale their AI Agency: https://bit.ly/4nA0cnl
🤝 Ready to transform your business with AI? Let's talk: https://bit.ly/493NdH8

🎙️ Have a story worth telling? Be a guest on my podcast: https://bit.ly/yt-podcast-application

The Top 5 Ways to get into AI in 2026: https://youtu.be/hT0pErCIAGc?si=I_-QTqiKH9eNx3Ld 

More AI Business Content ⤵️

→ Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/liamottley/
→ X: https://x.com/liamottley_

🚀 Apply to Join My Team: https://bit.ly/explore-roles

Connect with Albert Olgaard:
https://www.instagram.com/albert.olgaard/?hl=en
https://buildmyagent.io/

Grab his resource in my Skool community: https://bit.ly/3Xe7IcM
Request to join, then head to the Classroom - Resources section.

How do you build a million-dollar AI business fast? In this video, we dive into the exact 8-month playbook Albert Olgaard used to go from $0 to $160K/month — using AI tools, automation systems, and a bit of vibe coding to bring it all together.

We cover:
✅ How he launched an AI automation agency that hit $50K/month
✅ The systems behind his AI software (BuildMyAgent) generating $100K/month
✅ His viral content strategy that grew 240K+ followers in 8 months
✅ The step-by-step roadmap to build and scale your own AI business

⏱️ Timestamps:
00:00 What We're Covering
01:16 Service-first path to $10K/month — Decoy Offers & Proof-of-Concepts
12:40 Ads that compound — Retargeting, Lead Forms & SMS Reactivation
22:35 From Agency to SaaS — Fast No-Code MVP & Tool Stack
31:10 Content Engine to 240K — Hooks, Retention & DM Automations
44:09 Mindset, Timing & Where to Start Now
```

![Thumbnail (1920x1080)](https://i.ytimg.com/vi_webp/hqxvIju_yjs/maxresdefault.webp)
# [The AI Automation Agency Journey Explained (3 Key Phases)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=hqxvIju_yjs)

**Visibility**: Public
**Uploaded by**: [Liam Ottley](http://www.youtube.com/@LiamOttley)
**Uploaded at**: 2025-07-12T17:28:48-07:00
**Published at**: 2025-07-12T17:28:48-07:00
**Length**: 11:02
**Views**: 40569
**Likes**: 1072
**Category**: Education

## Description

```
📚 Join the #1 community for AI entrepreneurs and connect with 200,000+ members: https://bit.ly/three-phases
📈 We help entrepreneurs, industry experts & developers build and scale their AI Agency: https://bit.ly/three-phases-accelerator
🤝 Ready to transform your business with AI? Let's talk: https://bit.ly/three-phases-morningside

🚀 Apply to Join My Team at Morningside AI: https://bit.ly/ms-youtube-lo
🚀 Apply to Join My Team at AAA Accelerator: https://bit.ly/aaa-youtube-lo

My Vlog/BTS Channel: https://bit.ly/LiamOttleyVlogs

Wondering how to start or grow your AI agency in 2025? In this video, I break down the 3 key stages of building a profitable AI agency, whether you're just getting started or scaling toward six-figure transformation deals.

✅ Perfect for beginners, freelancers, agency owners, and tech consultants stepping into the AI space.

We cover:
1. AI Automation Agency – low-code, no-code solutions using tools like Make, Zapier & ChatGPT
2. AI Agency – full-stack dev teams, custom AI platforms, $30k–$100k+ projects
3. AI Transformation Partner (ITP) – long-term partnerships, strategy, and enterprise AI consulting ($100k–$250k+)

Whether you're building in Notion, Make, Airtable, or training voice agents, this framework will help you clarify where you are now and what the next level looks like.

💡 Learn how we scaled Morningside AI from low-code builds to six-figure enterprise partnerships—and how you can follow the same path.

⏱️ Timestamps
00:00 – Intro
01:13 – AI Automation Agency
02:52 – AI Agency
06:55 – AI Transformation Partner
09:39 – Recap & Final Thoughts
```

## Transcript

All right, hello people and welcome. This is a video on the three phases of the AI agency. I've been talking a lot about this new AITP, AI transformation partner thing and I mean I've talked about the AI automation agency and AI agency and there's like AI infrastructure and growth a growth partners agency a million and one different AI types of business models these days which I guess is is a good thing but just maybe for the for the for the beginner who's in here getting a bit confused about all these different terms they get thrown around. I just want to simplify how I see it, how I sort it out in my head, and I think it's it's going to be pretty valuable for you. So, uh, yeah, here we are on Myro, and I'm going to start off with a bit of a ramp shape like this. So, we have ramp there, and then we have this bit and then we have this bit. Right? So, this it's not Adidas logo. It is actually a uh a a sequence of steps a progression uh of your AI agency your AI service based business. So down the bottom here we have the A oh let me put it here a AA AI automation agency model and then we have the AI agency and then the final step here which I've been talking about a lot recently is the AITP AITP AI transformation partner. So uh a lot of different acronyms so let's make sense of it. So I just want to clarify what each of these terms means, how they're different, when you should start one, when should you move to the other, etc. So uh the AI automation agency down here is uh the starting point, the on-ramp to the AI business space that I I came up with a few years ago. And I spotted this opportunity cuz Morning Side AI uh when I started this YouTube channel, I just started making YouTube videos about what I was into in AI, talking about how it can help businesses and how you can start businesses with it. And then I got a whole bunch of interest and hey, can you help me? I was building these like custom knowledge chatbot things on uh on YouTube here. you can still find the videos. And I started getting people who are interested in those AI chatbots that I was building. And so I started selling AI consulting calls. I had a calendar link. It was like 300 bucks for 45 minutes. And all these people were booking in. And by the end of the calls, they were asking me like, "Hey, what can you just build this stuff for me?" And so I kind of naturally was like, I mean, yeah, I'm trying to figure out how to monetize this whole AI thing. So I I guess yeah, I can I can start building it. So I found a guy on Upwork and I started Morningside AI as as as a as an entity. And that was just before we'd realized the whole low code no code potential of of the AI space. This was more of an AI agency where you were doing sort of custom div custom div uh and we were writing using like lang chain coding this in Python and building AI systems for people using like uh pine cone and rag systems and at the time we saw it as just an AI development company. we were building software that used AI using traditional coding methods and so that's what I now define as a as an AI agency and in May of 2023 we started experimenting with uh using low code and no code tools to deliver the same kinds of chat bots that I was talking about so that was things like botress was bot press and then voice flow and then of course there's like make.com I mean zap year at the time and using low code and no code tools to deliver the same kind of stuff that we were doing on the custom dev side. And that was like the like aha moment when I was like, "Holy moly, we we're selling this stuff." Like I was just able to go onto this low code platform and whip up something in a few hours that we were charging 10 or $15,000 for when we custom coded it. And that was like the aha moment that now these hundreds of millions of people like many of you have been watching my videos for a while who could get into this could build AI stuff for businesses using low code and no code platforms like in this case the the the chatbot builders of voice flow and bot press uh the things like make.com where you had the the the chat GBT nodes in it as well and so that was the aha moment and that gave birth to the AI automation agency model or AAA which is what many of you have probably been running for a long time and that's the beginner on-ramp the whole point of that model that I really tried to point out is that that is the on-ramp. The the the magic part of it is that if you are nontechnical, you can now start to ease into it. You can build very basic automations with a little AI integration in it and you can build like build momentum. You can get experience. You can help your dad. You can help your mom or your your auntie's business or your friends or start to help people around you with this stuff. And even as a nontechnical person who's not an AI PhD that like most people still think that you need to have some kind of fancy degree in AI to to get into this stuff, but the experience that you can gain through an AI automation agency model allows you to actually become in the areas that you you spend the most time a an expert in AI implementation and AI automation for that industry. Say you do a lot of work in I don't know the construction industry. after you've done like four or five projects for AI automation within the construction industry, you're like at the the the you're leading the pack in terms of knowledge of how AI can help those businesses. And that was the sort of magic part about the AI automation agency model. And the AI agency is sort of the the upward shift from that in that once you've got cut your teeth, you sort of know how to do development, you know how to manage your team, you've you've got a consistent lead flow coming in, maybe you've made 3,000 I can probably put down here. So the ticket price of these will probably be like anywhere from $3 to $5,000. um you may be selling like a 10k package if you've uh found a good niched offer and you're uh selling that sort of multiple times to different businesses, but for the most part you're going to be seeing sort of around this range for the ticket size ties of these these projects. But in order to get more than that and to make a bit more money per project, uh you need to one establish a a consistent lead flow and that usually comes through content or ads or if you've got like a cold email system that's working, you can then hire a full stack developer who's capable of building like actual software and applications for your clients. So this is what we did at Morningside after going starting here and going back to there. Then we went back to here because we wanted to increase this ticket size to uh at least over 10K was our initial point. Um and that quickly rose to like minimum of 30K or it wasn't worth the effort for us of the proposals and calls and all of this freaking around. And so the shift from AI automation agency to an AI agency is the hiring of better dev talent and also hiring them full-time. So, you have a guy, maybe you're spending $7,000, $8,000 even a month, you're going to need a pretty solid lead generation system to be able to support something like that. But once you have that key hiring, like your first full-time uh full stack and ideally with some sort of AI experience as well, developer, and then you're able to offer these 30k, 40k, 50k projects that are much more uh there's much more to them than just a basic set of automations, right? You can build a whole platform. You can build a whole like SAS for them. is we did our first 100K project at Morningside was a full AI SAS platform for a training training people in the healthcare space and that was the first time we were able to jump really up into into the big leagues of these six figure projects and this comes through the custom dev capabilities of an AI agency. So that's the AI agency kind of explained it's having more full stack capabilities and being sort of a true AI development company that allows you to get much bigger deals up to sort of six figures and beyond. And so the final step here is from AI agency to AI transformation partner which I've got some videos on it. I'll link it up here or something or in the description or whatever uh maybe at the end. But this AI transformation partner model is at least the the the final evolution that we see uh at Morningside as where the industry is going. So that's why at Morningside we are shifting to this AI transformation partner model um where it's minimum sort of $100,000 engagements starting off with a 30 40 50 60k AI consultancy gig um which I've touched in depth in in another video which again I'll link but the AI transformation partner model is essentially not just treating the the development portion as everything there's a whole lot before that that can come in terms of hey we're not ready for development yet many businesses are not ready for development yet Many of you guys will know from my videos on the technology adoption life cycle like this. So we have the innovators here, the early adopters here, the early majority here, the late majority and then the lagards, right? So the adoption of a new technology can be split up like this. And when you're offering development services, you basically can only attack the people who are ready for development and that is actually a much smaller a very tiny portion of the total market of of of businesses who are interested in AI. So by moving into this AI transformation partner model, you brought in the potential market of businesses you can serve because you're not just going for that development ready people who are here, these early adopters. You're able to tap into the early majority and even the late majority which is actually the majority of the market here. Uh because you offer a discovery process like hey we are your AI transformation partner. We will walk you through from here to here from your very first like hey we're going to do a kickoff with an introduction to AI workshop for your team. We're going to explain what the stuff is. is we're going to explain the strengths of it, the weaknesses of it, the risks, the key terminology, how to manage privacy, etc. We will educate you and then we'll go into a discovery phase where we will fully understand your business. We'll map out all of your processes and then only then will we start to prescribe what we think you should implement and work on. So, you're able to get these these six figure minimum deals because you can get uh as as we've been doing at Morningside, $60,000 for a 4-week audit. And that's where my team of consultants will go in and map all their processes out. And then at the end of that, we see depending on the business, you can get up to like 250,000 in dev deals off the back of that as well. So, it's we we call this more of like an extended sales cycle where you get to build a lot of trust and ease into it. You you get to know the team really well. you build a lot of trust and and rapport and ultimately because you've fully mapped out their business like you know oh this happens here and then then Sandy comes over here and then they pass it to Bill and then it goes back into the into the CRM and it does this once you know all of that stuff you can make really good recommendations on what that business needs to do in terms of moving towards actual AI adoption and so by the end of your discovery phase and your AI audit they are ready to pay for this stuff because you've actually taken the time to get to know them you build trust with them and you actually understand their business so that is the final evolution of the AI automation agency or the AI agency uh model. We start off with the AI automation agency being the low code entry point for many people who are not technical. Once you've got a bit of momentum, you've you've got hands-on with actually delivering it in business. You understand the ecosystem of tools that exist. You understand the different use cases for AI uh within businesses, then you can start to roll that into hiring full-time developers uh that are are much better at at doing development than you and have a much broader skill set. So you can start to offer things like full SAS platforms and other much larger deliverables and projects than just the 3 to 5K automation. And that can be anywhere from $30,000 up to $100,000 as we do at Morningside. And then finally, once you've been doing that for a while, the final progression is to this AI transformation partner model where you offer them a full service transforming their business from just here at the at the absolute starting line to okay, we're going to figure out one, we're going to train you up. We're going to we're going to identify where the best opportunities are for you. We're going to build them for you and then we're going to help you manage your AI innovation and management and strategy longterm as a partner and that's how you can build long-term relationships that will get you hundreds of thousands of dollars uh in lifetime value. So that is the three phases of the AI agency. If you're interested in learning more about this one in particular, the AI transformation partner. I've just done a full video on it which you can find. I'll put over here u breaking that down and how you can start one. Hope they gave you a bit of clarity. There's so many terms floating around. I just wanted to kind of sort them out for you here so that you know the progression and how I see it that might help you as well. So yeah, I'll see you in the next


## Endscreen

Now it's time to apply what you've learned and gain

real-world experience

. Focus on learning, notearning. Getting them around the wrong way will be the death of your agency.You have no experience therefore you have

little to no value

. Experience in creating value with AI isfar more valuable than money at this stage, as only through experience can you eventually bevaluable enough to charge thousands of dollars per project!

􍠽

The easiest place to start to apply the skills you learned in phase one is to identify opportunities tobuild AI tools for yourself!This is the lowest pressure environment possible for you to start getting out of the classroom and intothe real world with your AI automation skills.

Utilizing the Skool Community



There is no better place on earth to find people who need AI automation help than in my freecommunity. There are over

40,000 people

,

40%

of which are active

every month

. Each dayhundreds of new members join, many of them searching for someone to help them.To not fully utilize the Skool community as your core resources for

networking, finding clients andsoaking up new ideas

is a huge missed opportunity for growth. Check off each of these and don’tstop coming back until you get where you want to go:

Make an introduction post in the Skool community:

Now that you have skills, you need tosell yourself! While most of you won’t have these kinds of credentials, a great example of anintroduction post can be found

here

:

Offer your services for free projects:

Make a post stating your skills and the kinds of projects you can help on. Example that worked well

here

.

Monitor and engage in the community daily:

Every day there are hundreds of people joining the community. Keep an eye out for interesting people and posts (especially the‘Hiring/For Hire’ tab), drop a comment and try to connect or DM them to start a conversation.If you do this daily, you will build up a substantial network and find opportunities to workeasily. Set a reminder on your Calendar to spend 15 minutes engaging with others.

Extremely Important

⚠

Work will not

magically

come to you. Some people post their introduction and think that’s the end of it.Doing the first two tasks above is

5%

of the work. The other

95%

is in the constant checking of the

“For Hire/Hiring” tab

in the Skool community to look for new opportunities.Stop expecting the world to come to you. If you want work,

go get it

by regularly monitoring for newhiring posts (e.g.

this

) and letting them know you’re ready to work (comment + DM them)

Start Warm Outreach

Listen to the

Hormozi $100m Leads podcast

.Follow his instructions on how to build your list of warm leadsSet a target of sending 20 personalized messages to new people per day + send follow ups &repliesTrack your progress in a spreadsheet

󝠽

All of you want to succeed. Few of you are

willing to do what it takes

to succeed.If you follow the instructions above and:1\. Regularly build new things and share your learnings in the Skool community2\. Check the Hiring/For Hire board daily and engage with all posts3\. Send 20 new messages to warm contacts each day & track in a spreadsheetThis really is

not much

to do. After 2 months, you will be ready to get

paid

for your work.Success is really a lot of

boring work

like this done

over and over.

I’ve given you the formula, nowyou get to decide if you really want it or not.

PHASE 3: MONETIZE

Months 5-6: Start Charging for Your Services

Once you have at least three successful free project deliveries, you're ready to start monetizing your skills. As you will have learned in

this video

of the free course, pricing is based on your skills andexperience. How you charge for your services will constantly be evolving over time as you becomemore skillful and experienced and as you hire people who bring their own skills and experience.



GOAL:

Land your first paying client at a low price point, then slowly increase your prices over time.



REASONING:

You’re still not an expert AI solutions architect. You have a long way to go yet, butyou are good enough to start being compensated for your time and expertise.In this section I’ll break down the strategy to start landing your first paying clients:

1\. Handle the Formalities

󽠽

2\. Keep Doing What's Working



3\. Personal Brand Launch

󽠽

4\. Explore Other Lead Generation Methods

􍠾

5\. Hiring Your First Developer

󽮁

Handle the Formalities

󽠽

Before you start taking on paid clients, get your business basics in order:Set up a payment processor Choose either Stripe or PayPal (or both)Create an account as a sole trader/proprietor (no need for an LLC at this point)Learn how to send an invoice (quick YT search will do)Get your contract template readyWatch my

video on contracts

Download the templateCreate your proposal templateCreate a copy of

my proposal template

Customize it with your branding (use an

AI logo generator

)

Keep Doing What's Working



The easiest way to move from free to paid projects is to keep doing

more

of what we did in phase 2!Now that you have more experience and a more substantial track record of projects, you are justifiedin asking to be paid,The Skool community can provide

all

the paid clients you need. Don't overcomplicate things - stickingto what worked in Phase 2 will provide you with leads, but now you will charge for your services.

Weekly To-dos:Share detailed breakdowns of your builds on Skool:

The cooler the stuff you build, themore interest you’ll get on your Skool posts! This is the best way to showcase your skills andgenerate leads.

Daily To-dos:Check the Hiring/For Hire board daily:

This is still the best way to find people who needyour services, don’t stop checking it!

Network within the community:

○ Comment on others' posts○ Share your expertise for all to see○ Build genuine relationships by hopping on calls with people you find interesting

Key Takeaway



You don't need

fancy

marketing tactics to get your first paying clients. The community that helped youlearn can become your client base too!

![Thumbnail (1920x1080)](https://i.ytimg.com/vi_webp/ykRToEkWvpA/maxresdefault.webp)
# [I’ve been called crazy before…](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ykRToEkWvpA)

**Visibility**: Public
**Uploaded by**: [Liam Ottley](http://www.youtube.com/@LiamOttley)
**Uploaded at**: 2026-02-24T18:03:53-08:00
**Published at**: 2026-02-24T18:03:53-08:00
**Length**: 09:35
**Views**: 10146
**Likes**: 402
**Category**: Education

## Description

```
⚙️ WEBINAR: Build an AI Operating System for Your Business in 7 Days: https://bit.ly/webinar-aios-blueprint
📈 Get daily AIOS Workshops from me in my Accelerator: https://bit.ly/4s8fORG

📚 Join the #1 community for AI entrepreneurs and connect with 280k+ members: https://bit.ly/4s8fOkE
🤝 Ready to transform your business with AI? Let's talk: https://bit.ly/3ZVlqmk
📋 Get our FREE 14-day playbook for finding high-impact AI opportunities in any business: https://bit.ly/14-day-playbook-

My Vlog/BTS Channel: https://bit.ly/LiamOttleyVlogs

In 2023, I coined the AI Automation Agency (AAA) model and told everyone it was the future of making money with AI. They called me crazy. Three years later, thousands of AI agencies have launched, my agency Morningside AI works with Fortune 500 companies and NBA teams, and an entire industry was built around it. Now I'm making the same bet again with what I'm calling AI Operating Systems (AIOS), using Claude Code to automate 60-70% of my business and run it from my phone. In this video, I break down the original contrarian call I made in 2023, the story of two non-technical founders who took action and built a business doing hundreds of thousands, why the skepticism around AI operating systems looks identical to what I faced before, and how I'm already using Claude Code and Telegram to build an AI-powered business system that works while I sleep. If you're a beginner looking to start an AI business in 2026, an entrepreneur exploring AI automation, or just someone wondering whether this AI opportunity is real — this is the video I wish someone made for me three years ago.

⏱️ Timestamps:
00:00 What We're Covering
00:43 The contrarian bet: from ChatGPT moment to AI Automation Agency
02:01 No-code/low-code unlocks scale 
05:04 The AI Operating System
05:55 Case study: OmniFusion AI
07:39 Who should act now
```
